subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Lord! O my wandering carpenter! [3.5s]... ...Thy brief letter made me very hopeful. Praise be to God that thou art firm and steadfast
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده پروردگار ای آواره من نجار نامه اختصار شما مرا امیدوار نمود که الحمد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @education of children; moral education, @importance of community building, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
